articles.description:
Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses feature white creme droplet-shaped Kisses embedded with cookie pieces.

A 9-oz bag retails for $5.99, but I received this courtesy of Hershey's.



There was a nice brown sugar and cinnamon cookie smell when I opened the bag.



There were notes of cinnamon and vanilla to give the white creme a snickerdoodle flavor, while the cookie pieces delivered a nice crunch. It was creamy and not too sweet. The cookie pieces reminded me of Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme, only not chocolate.



When it comes down to it, I like snickerdoodles, and Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses capture the flavor well with some crunch to boot.
Nutritional Info - Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses
Serving Size - 7 pieces (54g)
Calories - 160
Fat - 6g (Saturated Fat - 5g)
Sodium - 35mg
Carbs - 20g (Sugar - 16g)
Protein - 2g

articles.title: Review: Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses

articles.description:
Ahead of the new year and its requisite resolutions, Chipotle is launching its first-ever High Protein Menu in the US and Canada on Tuesday, December 23, 2025.

The new curated menu includes options ranging from 15 to 80 grams of protein per item, including a new High Protein Cup, which is a 4-oz cup of the chain's Adobo Chicken (32g protein, 180 calories) for an average price of $3.82. Also on Chipotle's High Protein Menu are:
- Double High Protein Bowl (81g protein, 11g fiber, 760 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, light white rice, black beans, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and extra romaine lettuce.
- High Protein-High Fiber Bowl (46g protein, 14g fiber, 540 calories) - Adobo Chicken, light brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, roasted chili-corn salsa, fresh tomato salsa, and romaine lettuce
- High Protein-Low Calorie Salad (36g protein, 10g fiber, 470 calories) - Adobo Chicken, Supergreens lettuce mix, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, and guacamole.
- Double High Protein Burrito (79g protein, 6g fiber, 840 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, fresh tomato salsa, fajita veggies, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla.
- Adobo Chicken Taco (15g protein, 190 calories) - Adobo Chicken, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce on a soft flour tortilla.
Photo via Chipotle.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Chipotle Unveils New High Protein Menu

articles.description:
Crumbl bakes its new Salted Caramel Brownie and more for a limited time from December 22 through December 27, 2025.

With Christmas coming in a few days, this week's lineup is heavy on the holiday/winter themes. Here's what you can expect:
- New Salted Caramel Brownie - A warm chocolate brownie topped with a layer of caramel, a semi-sweet chocolate drizzle, and a pinch of sea salt.
- Peppermint Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled vanilla bean cookie with peppermint pieces topped with peppermint white drop frosting and crushed peppermint pieces.
- Biscoff Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled brown sugar cookie topped with a buttercream made with Biscoff cookie butter and cookie crumbs.
- Sugar Cookie featuring Mother's Reindeer Games - A warm sugar cookie with red and green sprinkles, topped with a pool of white chocolate (with more sprinkles) and a Mother's Reindeer Games cookie.
- Frozen Hot Chocolate Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookie topped with hot cocoa-flavored mousse and mini marshmallows.
- Cinnamon Roll Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie topped with cinnamon streusel and a swirl of vanilla cream cheese frosting.
- Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a dash of flaky sea salt.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Salted Caramel Brownie and More Through December 27, 2025

articles.description:
Trader Joe's Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches feature two layers of vanilla ice cream sandwiched between two gingerbread cookies shaped like men.

A 13.52-oz box of four sandwiches costs $3.99.



The ice cream sandwich was fairly small and snackable. There are strong, warm spices (cinnamon and ginger), and brown sugar notes from the soft gingerbread cookies. They're not so soft that they stick to your finger like the traditional chocolate ice cream sandwiches I grew up eating, but they're easy to bite into without much in the way of crumbs dropping.



The vanilla ice cream is flecked with vanilla beans, but the vanilla flavor struggles to come across as the gingerbread cookies are definitely the star of the show. The ice cream was sweet and creamy.



Overall, Trader Joe's Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches were really nice and definitely worth a try if you're a fan of soft gingerbread and ice cream. Both the flavor and the appearance fit the holiday season well.

After being discontinued this year, Sweet & Sour Sauce will be returning to Wendy's in spring 2026.

Sweet & Sour Sauce was discontinued in the fall this year to make way for six new/revamped sauces (with Sweet Chili being the closest analogue) that launched along with Wendy's new Chicken Tenders (here's my review of the tenders).
According to Wendy's, additional details will be released closer to the sauce's return.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sweet & Sour Sauce Will Return to Wendy's in Spring 2026

articles.description:
Starting December 30, 2025, Whataburger launches the new Big Ranch Wrap and brings back two menu items: the Monterey Melt and Chicken Fajita Taco.

The Big Ranch Wrap features a crispy chicken strip, lettuce, tomato, buttermilk ranch, and American cheese, wrapped up in a flour tortilla. Whataburger's take on a Snack Wrap will cost $3 at participating locations.
The Monterey Melt consists of two beef patties, Monterey Jack and American cheeses, grilled onions and peppers, and Jalapeno Ranch served between two slices of Texas toast.
The Chicken Fajita Taco features strips of grilled chicken breast, seared onions, poblano, and red peppers, folded in a warm flour tortilla.
All three items will be available for a limited time only.
Photo via Whataburger.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Big Ranch Wrap Arrives at Whataburger Along with Two Returning Items

articles.description:
As a promotion timed in concert with a boxing match between Jake Paul and Anthony Joshua live on Netflix on December 19, 2025, KFC is offering its rewards members a deal where they can get a free Big Box Meal with an online purchase of $10 or more.

The deal is available from December 19 through December 21, 2025, at participating locations nationwide.
The available Big Box Meal options include:


3-pc Chicken Big Box Meal - Three pieces of fried chicken, two sides, a biscuit, and a medium drink.
5-pc Tenders Big Box Meal - Five tenders, two sides, a biscuit, and a medium drink.
Chicken Sandwich + Nuggets Big Box Meal - A Classic or Spicy Chicken Sandwich, five chicken nuggets, a side, and a medium drink.


Prices vary, but Big Box Meals normally range from $15.99 to $18.39 at my local KFC here in Los Angeles.
Then, with the college football season, KFC will be offering a buy-one-get-one-free Famous Bowl deal during all college football bowl games for KFC Rewards members when ordering online.
Other limited-time, national deals at KFC right now include:


$4.99 Pot Pies
Three Large Sides for $10 when ordering online (they're calling it "Sidesgiving")


Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Offers Free Big Box Meal with $10 Purchase

articles.description:
The Quesarito returns to Taco Bell for a limited time starting December 18, 2025.

The Quesarito (a portmanteau of "quesadilla" and "burrito") features a grilled quesadilla filled with melted 3-cheese blend and warm nacho cheese sauce, wrapped in burrito fashion around a combination of seasoned beef, seasoned rice, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, and reduced-fat sour cream. It carries a suggested price of $4.99.
Taco Bell's Quesarito was introduced in 2014, and the chain released various variants of it over the years until discontinuing it in 2023. It's one of those items that the chain stocks the ingredients to make, but no longer offers.
The chain will be offering a Tuesday Drop on December 23, 2025, at 2PM PT on the Taco Bell mobile app, where the first 30,000 rewards members can get a $1 Quesarito deal.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Brings Back Quesarito
